title: First Reaction to the Iran-US tentative Deal
section_path: First Reaction to the Iran-US tentative Deal
section_path_text: First Reaction to the Iran-US tentative Deal
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Financial markets are naturally celebrating the news of a potential deal to be signed by the end of the week between Iran and the US. While we see this development as a net positive, we also see a bumpy road towards normality and some scenarios where the deal falls through. The facts: The tentative bilateral agreement between the United States and Iran, reportedly to be signed this Friday 19th June, represents a critical juncture for global geoeconomics, geopolitics and financial markets, including oil markets.
